parts.description: long perforated/slotted rail or plate subassembly body
second long perforated/slotted rail or plate subassembly body

step_analysis.analysis: Two distinct colored long assemblies are shown. Each is a single independent part by color grouping. They appear as similar elongated perforated/slotted plate-like members, likely prepared as separate subassemblies or mirrored rails. No other active colored part is visible as assembled in this step.

Two distinct side-frame-like parts are assembled/defined here. The green part is a larger ladder/frame panel with multiple uprights and cross-features; the red part is a second complementary side structure. They form a paired side-frame set for the product.

This step adds a bank of slender vertical posts/rods plus linking rails between them. The colored groups indicate 8 separate post-like parts and 3 transverse/linking members. Geometry suggests these become an internal rack/grid inserted between the previously formed side structures. The bottom green geometry also shows the side-frame context from the prior step as receiving structure, so this step most plausibly assembles the rod/grid subassembly into the side-frame assembly.

Two new large enclosing structural panels/brackets are added onto the existing frame-and-rod assembly. One is a large panel-like side cover/frame; the other is a large bracketed panel with many long edges and mounting relations. This appears to complete the outer shell/side structure around the rack/frame built in previous steps.
